commands.repair_reason: - No ClawSweeper repair lane is needed because this is an open maintainer-authored PR with no actionable patch defect found.; Cleared: The diff only adds an internal registry-name helper and Go conformance test coverage; it does not alter secrets handling, dependencies, CI, or runtime provider provisioning. (sha=4b5c436507a7d5e5d0d4912bb9be943263f7d879)
commands.review_summary:
The PR exposes registered provider names from the CLI package and adds conformance coverage to keep the all-provider test list synchronized with the registry.

Reproducibility: yes. from source: current main registers Nebius and Scaleway in internal/providers/all/all.go, while allBuiltInProviderNames() in internal/providers/all/all_test.go omits them from the shared conformance loops.
commands.review_followup: - No ClawSweeper repair lane is needed because this is an open maintainer-authored PR with no actionable patch defect found.

target.title: test(providers): cover registered provider list
target.body:
## Summary
- expose canonical registered provider names for internal conformance checks
- assert the all-provider conformance list matches the provider registry
- add missing nebius and scaleway entries to the conformance list

## Verification
- go test ./internal/providers/all -run 'TestAllBuiltInProviderNamesCoverRegistry|TestAllBuiltInProvidersExposeDoctor|TestProviderKindRequiresBackendInterface|TestCleanupFeatureRequiresCleanupBackend|TestSSHFeatureRequiresSSHLoginBackend|TestCrabboxSyncFeatureRequiresSSHLeaseBackend|TestDirectTailscaleFeatureRequiresMetadataBackend|TestURLBridgeFeatureRequiresBridgeProvider|TestPauseResumeFeatureRequiresPausableBackend|TestWorkspaceFeaturesRequireNativeCheckpointProvider|TestRunEvidenceFeaturesRequireDelegatedBackends'
- go test ./internal/providers/all
- go test ./...
- go vet ./...
- git diff --check
target.author: vincentkoc
